title: Silver State Superstars!
content: Congratulations to this year's award recipients! Kristen Garcia has been named the recipient of the Craig Rogers Award, recognizing her outstanding contributions to damage prevention and the 811 community. JBM Underground has been honored with the Silver Shovel Award for their commitment to safe excavation practices and excellence in the field. Please join us in celebrating both Kristen and the JBM Underground team for their well-deserved recognition.
